reviews.review_title: The RIGHT WAY to use Gtag movement
reviews.review_description:
Overall this game is AMAZING especially with it being free, buut here's a longer review

Personal favorite positives:
-Amazing Devs
-Lots of maps
-Very good PVE scaling
-Lots of silly attacks
-Third Person feature
-All of PVP

Personal suggestions:
-fully customizable avatar system
-turn off body for first person in settings,

here's my longer review!
 W game tbh! I really love the different maps and level scaling and I also LOVE the different types of attacks you can do, I think an avatar customization system instead of just the randomize would be really nice, I also love the fact theres third-person as an option ngl, its rare in vr games but ive always really liked it tbh, maybe look into adding a setting to turn off body view in first person though, it helps with footage a LOT, I also love the whole PVP mode because it feels like RR paintball with gorilla tag movement, ive never sweated so hard on bots in my life and im not even a gtag player 💀 you actually made the gtag movement fun

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for taking the time to leave us such a detailed and positive review! Your suggestions for fully customizable avatar system and turn off body for first person are fantastic. We're still constantly working on updates and we'll add them to enhance the player experience in the future version. We truly appreciate your feedback and are thrilled to hear that you're enjoying our game. Once again, Thank you for your support and for being a part of our gaming community!

Hello! Thank you for enjoying our game! We greatly appreciate it. We are continuously updating the game, and recently we added a voice chat feature. Next, we'll be introducing more new maps. Please stay tuned! Also feel free to join our Discord (https://discord.gg/mHMhrTCtZS) and let us know in the #feedback channel where we can improve. Thank you again and your support is like a warm hug!
